author: y4rr
content: Completed sprint B.5.c+e. Delivered 3 crosslink issues (#919/#923/#927) for bugs #867/#869/#873. Added 22 new conformance tests in conformance_vision_models.rs. Extended fixture script. 45/45 tests pass, clippy -D warnings clean on ferrotorch-vision. Pre-existing resnet bottleneck test failure is from B.5.a parallel sprint, not in scope.
